_comment: Asset manifest for the 3D web renderer. Maps agents and object types/categories to real glTF (.glb) models. Entries with a model that fails to load fall back automatically to the shipped SVG sprite icons. Absolute http(s) URLs load as-is; relative paths resolve under /static/assets/ (e.g. 'models/plant.glb').
